---
name: Tool Info Outdated
about: Report that a tool's pricing, rate limits, or endpoint has changed
title: "[STALE] <tool name> info is outdated"
labels: tool-stale
assignees: ''
---

## Tool name

[The name of the tool as it appears in the registry]

## Which registry?

- [ ] `tools/free-tools.yaml`
- [ ] `tools/apis.yaml`
- [ ] `tools/cli-tools.yaml`
- [ ] `tools/mcp-tools.json`

## What changed?

- [ ] Pricing changed
- [ ] Rate limits changed
- [ ] Endpoint changed
- [ ] API key requirement changed
- [ ] Tool is deprecated / no longer available
- [ ] Other: [describe]

## Current (outdated) info

[Copy the relevant fields from the registry entry]

## Updated info

[Provide the correct, current information with a source link]

## Source

[Link to the provider's documentation, pricing page, or announcement confirming the change]

## Verification

- [ ] I have tested the updated endpoint/example command
- [ ] I have confirmed the new pricing/rate limits with the provider's official documentation
- [ ] I have updated the `last_verified` field to today's date
